name: Pear and Hazelnut Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bread machine in order.
2. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock. Select "white bread" and push Start.
3. In hot & humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
4. Ripe, actually overripe pears make the sweetest, moistest bread. This subtly flavored loaf does fine on its own and makes excellent plain, cinnamon, or French toast. You can also place a thin slice of cold cooked lamb on it and briefly warm in the broiler.
